bbL.doc: Long entry needs %B below this. Live: -0.1.
bbL.label: Bollinger %B below … to buy

bbS.doc: Short entry needs %B above this. Live: 1.65 (makes shorts extremely rare).
bbS.label: Bollinger %B above … to short

rsiValLong.doc: Long entry requires RSI(3) below this. Live: 68.
rsiValLong.label: RSI below … to buy

rsiValShort.doc: Short entry requires RSI(3) above this. Live: 68.
rsiValShort.label: RSI above … to short

slLong.doc: Live: 0.10. In lev mode there is no stop (your live style).
slLong.label: Stop-loss % — longs (spot only)

zL.doc: Long entry: z-scored entry-MACD must be BELOW this. Your live value ≈ -1.7 in z-units.
zL.label: Long entry trigger — dip depth (z-score)

zS.doc: Short entry: z-scored entry-MACD must be ABOVE this.
zS.label: Short entry trigger — rip height (z-score)

prime.note: Solana Prime = the RSI/MACD/BB dip system standalone (no crossover), ATR-switched EMA trend filter. Every parameter searchable, per regime. Base = your live xlsx values (validated 105/111 trades). Genetic, random, and refine algorithms all supported.

apt1Long.doc: Profit target after dur1Long minutes in the trade.
apt1Long.label: Profit target — longs (after step 1)

apt2Long.doc: Profit target after dur2Long minutes (give-up level).
apt2Long.label: Profit target — longs (after step 2)

bbValLong.doc: Long entry requires Bollinger %B below this.
bbValLong.label: Bollinger %B below … to buy

bbValShort.doc: Short entry requires Bollinger %B above this.
bbValShort.label: Bollinger %B above … to short

cdPctLong.doc: 1-min move that triggers the long-side cooldown.
cdPctLong.label: Long cooldown trigger — 1-min move %

cdPctShort.doc: 3-min rise that triggers the short-side cooldown.
cdPctShort.label: Short cooldown trigger — 3-min rise %

dur1Long.doc: Minutes until PT drops to apt1Long.
dur1Long.label: Minutes until long PT step 1

dur1Short.doc: Minutes until PT drops to apt1Short.
dur1Short.label: Minutes until short PT step 1

dur2Long.doc: Minutes until PT drops to apt2Long.
dur2Long.label: Minutes until long PT step 2

dur2Short.doc: Minutes until PT drops to apt2Short.
dur2Short.label: Minutes until short PT step 2

leverage.doc: Position leverage (capped at 10; lev mode only).
leverage.label: Leverage

rsiValLong.doc: Long entry requires RSI below this.
rsiValLong.label: RSI below … to buy

rsiValShort.doc: Short entry requires RSI above this.
rsiValShort.label: RSI above … to short

slLong.doc: Stop-loss %, longs (spot mode only; lev mode has no stop).
slLong.label: Stop-loss % — longs (spot only)

xApt1Long.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-system PT after xDur1Long min.
xApt1Long.label: Crossover PT — longs (after step 1)

xApt1Short.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-system PT after xDur1Short min.
xApt1Short.label: Crossover PT — shorts (after step 1)

xApt2Long.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-system PT after xDur2Long min.
xApt2Long.label: Crossover PT — longs (after step 2)

xApt2Short.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-system PT after xDur2Short min.
xApt2Short.label: Crossover PT — shorts (after step 2)

xCdPctShort.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-short cooldown trigger.
xCdPctShort.label: Crossover-short cooldown trigger %

xCdPeriodShort.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-short cooldown length, minutes.
xCdPeriodShort.label: Crossover-short cooldown length (minutes)

xDur1Long.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-system minutes to PT step 1.
xDur1Long.label: Minutes until crossover long PT step 1

xDur1Short.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-system minutes to PT step 1.
xDur1Short.label: Minutes until crossover short PT step 1

xDur2Long.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-system minutes to PT step 2.
xDur2Long.label: Minutes until crossover long PT step 2

xDur2Short.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-system minutes to PT step 2.
xDur2Short.label: Minutes until crossover short PT step 2

xMinBetween.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Min spacing between cross-system entries (x20 bars).
xMinBetween.label: Min spacing between crossover trades

xTpLong.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-system base PT, longs.
xTpLong.label: Crossover profit target — longs (initial)

xTpShort.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-system base PT, shorts.
xTpShort.label: Crossover profit target — shorts (initial)

zL.doc: Long entry: z-scored entry-MACD must be BELOW this (how deep a dip to buy).
zL.label: Long entry trigger — dip depth (z-score)

zS.doc: Short entry: z-scored entry-MACD must be ABOVE this.
zS.label: Short entry trigger — rip height (z-score)

zXLmax.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-system long: crossover only counts if z-MACD is below this.
zXLmax.label: Crossover long ceiling (z-score)

zXS.doc: (inactive in Prime7 — crossover system is locked off) Cross-system short: z-scored crossover-MACD must exceed this at crossunder.
zXS.label: Crossover short trigger (z-score)

eL3.doc: Enable the RSI/MACD/BB dip-buy long system.
eL3.label: Dip-buy long system on/off

eXL.doc: LOCKED OFF in Prime7 (Prime is the dip system standalone). Enable the MACD-crossover long system.
eXL.label: Crossover long system on/off

eXS.doc: LOCKED OFF in Prime7 (Prime is the dip system standalone). Enable the MACD-crossover short system.
eXS.label: Crossover short system on/off

requireHistPos.doc: LOCKED OFF in Prime7 (Prime is the dip system standalone). Cross-longs need histogram > 0 at the crossover.
requireHistPos.label: Require histogram > 0 for crossover longs

trendBlockZ.doc: Block ALL shorts when price is this many daily-vol z-scores above its 1-day EMA (melt-up protection).
trendBlockZ.label: Melt-up short blocker

vEmaDn.doc: Trend EMA for short entries (must be falling).
vEmaDn.label: Trend EMA length — short entries

vEmaUp.doc: Trend EMA for long entries (must be rising).
vEmaUp.label: Trend EMA length — long entries

vHistN.doc: Histogram must rise for N bars before a cross-long.
vHistN.label: Histogram must rise for … bars

prime7.note: Prime7 = Solana Prime upgraded to the full-parameter V7 engine: every indicator length (RSI / MACD / Bollinger / trend-EMA) is searchable via the variant menus, entry triggers are z-scored (volatility-adjusted) instead of raw %, and the MACD-crossover subsystem is locked OFF to preserve Prime's dip-system character. Defaults marked on parameters are your live xlsx values. Indicator length LIBRARIES are shared with V7 (same engine) — edit them under the V7 strategy.

scalpx.note: ScalpX = VRVP+CVD+EMA scalp strategy. CVD/POC/EMA lengths are fixed; thresholds and brackets are searchable. Reminder: tested edge-less in every configuration so far.

vC.doc: SMA length applied to cumulative volume delta (default 50).
vC.label: CVD smoothing length

vE.doc: Slow EMA for the EMA-cross branch (default 1200; fast stays 1 = close).
vE.label: Slow EMA length

vP.doc: Bars used to find the highest-volume close (default 300).
vP.label: VRVP / POC lookback

vR.doc: RSI period variant (script default 14). Uncheck options to narrow the search.
vR.label: RSI length

scalpx2.note: ScalpX2 = ScalpX upgraded with searchable indicator lengths: RSI, CVD smoothing, VRVP lookback and slow-EMA are now variant menus the optimizer explores per regime. Thresholds/brackets as before. Reminder: the scalp family has tested edge-less so far — holdout is the number to trust.

ptScale.doc: One multiplier applied to ALL profit targets (V6 keeps the original PT structure and scales it).
ptScale.label: Profit-target scale

zL.doc: Long entry: z-scored entry-MACD must be BELOW this.
zL.label: Long entry trigger — dip depth (z-score)

zS.doc: Short entry: z-scored entry-MACD must be ABOVE this.
zS.label: Short entry trigger — rip height (z-score)

zXLmax.doc: Crossover-long only counts below this (sampled ~50% of the time; else the subsystem is disabled).
zXLmax.label: Crossover long ceiling (z-score)

zXS.doc: Crossover-short gate on z-scored crossover MACD.
zXS.label: Crossover short trigger (z-score)

v6.note: V6 = thresholds only; indicator lengths are fixed (that's what V7 unlocked).

apt1Long.doc: Profit target after dur1Long minutes in the trade.
apt1Long.label: Profit target — longs (after step 1)

apt2Long.doc: Profit target after dur2Long minutes (give-up level).
apt2Long.label: Profit target — longs (after step 2)

bbValLong.label: Bollinger %B below … to buy

bbValShort.doc: Short entry requires Bollinger %B above this.
bbValShort.label: Bollinger %B above … to short

cdPctLong.label: Long cooldown trigger — 1-min move %

cdPctShort.doc: 3-min rise that triggers the short-side cooldown.
cdPctShort.label: Short cooldown trigger — 3-min rise %

dur1Long.label: Minutes until long PT step 1

dur1Short.label: Minutes until short PT step 1

rsiValLong.label: RSI below … to buy

rsiValShort.doc: Short entry requires RSI above this.

slLong.doc: Stop-loss %, longs (spot mode only; lev mode has no stop).
slLong.label: Stop-loss % — longs (spot only)

xDur1Long.label: Minutes until crossover long PT step 1

xDur1Short.label: Minutes until crossover short PT step 1

xDur2Short.label: Minutes until crossover short PT step 2

xMinBetween.doc: Min spacing between cross-system entries (x20 bars).
xMinBetween.label: Min spacing between crossover trades

zL.doc: Long entry: z-scored entry-MACD must be BELOW this (how deep a dip to buy).

zS.doc: Short entry: z-scored entry-MACD must be ABOVE this.
